name: Mermaid Journey — Patient Experience Through Clinical Trial
input: Create a user journey diagram showing a patient experience through a clinical trial with satisfaction ratings.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: User journey map with phases, touchpoints, and satisfaction ratings.

data.syntax:
journey
    title Patient Clinical Trial Experience
    section Screening
      Learn about trial: 3: Patient
      Consent process: 4: Patient, Coordinator
      Eligibility tests: 2: Patient, Lab
    section Enrollment
      Randomization: 3: Patient, Coordinator
      Baseline tests: 4: Patient, Lab
    section Treatment
      Receive medication: 5: Patient, Pharmacist
      Report side effects: 2: Patient
      Follow-up visits: 4: Patient, Physician
    section Completion
      Final assessment: 4: Patient, Physician
      Unblinding: 5: Patient, Coordinator
      Results shared: 5: Patient
data.caption: Patient journey through clinical trial phases with satisfaction scores
